title: Shooting in US on fourth of July: 8, including 4 children, injured in Brooklyn's Coney Island
summary_full: Tragedy struck Coney Island on Friday night as a shooting left at least eight people injured, including four young children. The incident occurred around 10:37 pm, with victims ranging from six to 37 years old. While most are in stable condition, a 21-year-old woman is critically injured. Police have recovered a firearm but no arrests have been made as investigations continue into the disturbing event.
